# Heritage Roofing, Inc.

> Family-owned roofing contractor in Stephenville, TX since 1986. Licensed and insured. Serving residential and commercial customers across Central Texas.

## Pages

- [Home](https://heritageroofingtexas.com) — Main landing page; company overview, services, locations, and primary contact CTAs.
- [Contact](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/contact) — Office address (1590 N Bates St, Stephenville TX 76401), phone numbers, and contact form.
- [Gallery](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/gallery) — Photos of completed residential and commercial roofing projects across Central Texas.

## Services

- [All Services](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/services) — Overview of every roofing service Heritage Roofing offers.
- [Residential Roofing](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/services/residential-roofing) — New roof installation and replacement for homes in Stephenville TX and surrounding areas.
- [Commercial Roofing](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/services/commercial-roofing) — TPO, EPDM, metal, and flat roofing systems for commercial properties.
- [Roof Repair](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/services/roof-repair) — Leak repairs, missing shingles, flashing, and general roof repair across Central Texas.
- [Roof Replacement](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/services/roof-replacement) — Full tear-off and replacement with material and workmanship warranties.
- [Storm & Hail Damage](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/services/storm-hail-damage) — Storm and hail damage repair with insurance claim support and emergency tarping.
- [Roof Inspections](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/services/roof-inspections) — Written inspection reports with photos; free estimates.
- [Skylights & Ventilation](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/services/skylights-ventilation) — Skylight installation and attic ventilation to improve comfort and roof longevity.
- [Emergency Repairs](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/services/emergency-repairs) — Emergency roof repairs available 7 days a week across Central Texas.

## Locations

- [All Locations](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations) — Overview of all 16 communities Heritage Roofing serves in Central Texas.
- [Stephenville, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/stephenville) — Primary service area; Erath County. Call 254-968-7663.
- [Granbury, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/granbury) — Hood County service area. Call 817-573-0890.
- [Brownwood, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/brownwood) — Brown County service area. Call 325-510-5768.
- [Dublin, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/dublin) — Erath County. Call 254-968-7663.
- [Hico, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/hico) — Hamilton County. Call 254-968-7663.
- [Eastland, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/eastland) — Eastland County. Call 254-968-7663.
- [De Leon, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/de-leon) — Comanche County. Call 325-510-5768.
- [Glen Rose, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/glen-rose) — Somervell County. Call 817-573-0890.
- [Weatherford, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/weatherford) — Parker County. Call 817-573-0890.
- [Mineral Wells, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/mineral-wells) — Palo Pinto County. Call 817-573-0890.
- [Hamilton, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/hamilton) — Hamilton County. Call 325-510-5768.
- [Goldthwaite, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/goldthwaite) — Mills County. Call 325-510-5768.
- [Comanche, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/comanche) — Comanche County. Call 325-510-5768.
- [Santa Anna, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/santa-anna) — Coleman County. Call 325-510-5768.
- [Coleman, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/coleman) — Coleman County. Call 325-510-5768.
- [Bangs, TX](https://heritageroofingtexas.com/locations/bangs) — Brown County. Call 325-510-5768.
